name: MRI Software Real Estate Management API
what_it_does: MRI Software REST API for enterprise real estate management platform covering commercial and residential property. Enables AI agents to manage lease administration and lease abstraction, handle commercial property accounting and financials, access tenant management and communications, retrieve investment analytics and portfolio performance, manage maintenance and facilities workflows, handle commercial lease renewals and rent escalations, access affordable housing compliance data (HUD, LIHTC), retrieve investor reporting and distribution data, and integrate real estate data with accounting and ERP systems.
use_cases: Managing commercial lease administration from real estate asset management agents
Accessing property accounting and financials from commercial real estate agents
Retrieving portfolio analytics and investor reporting from investment management agents
Handling HUD/LIHTC affordable housing compliance from compliance automation agents
not_for: Residential property managers without commercial real estate and investment focus
Simple landlords without enterprise-scale lease and investment management
Residential-only property without commercial lease complexity
best_when: A commercial real estate owner, REIT, property manager, or affordable housing operator using MRI Software wants AI agents to automate lease administration, commercial accounting, investor reporting, portfolio analytics, and compliance workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Commercial lease data includes sensitive tenant financial terms and NOI calculations. Investor reporting automation must be accurate — errors affect distributions. Affordable housing (LIHTC/HUD) compliance errors have federal regulatory consequences. Automated rent escalation must match lease terms exactly.

auth.notes: MRI Software uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant and property-level credentials. Developer portal with API documentation. Open and Connected partner ecosystem. Webhooks for lease and financial events. Strong commercial real estate integration framework.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — commercial real estate enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit and per-module enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Cleveland, Ohio. Founded 1971. Major enterprise real estate management platform. Acquired by GI Partners (private equity) 2015. 16,000+ clients managing 3M+ units. Strong commercial, residential, and affordable housing verticals. MRI Open and Connected partner ecosystem. Competes with Yardi and RealPage for commercial real estate.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Commercial lease data with tenant financials — NOI calculations are sensitive business data
LIHTC/HUD compliance errors have federal consequences — automated affordable housing data requires compliance review
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with Open and Connected partner ecosystem
Rent escalation automation must match lease language exactly — CPI and fixed escalations differ
Investor reporting automation must handle complex distribution waterfall calculations correctly
Commercial and residential modules have different API endpoints and data models
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial real estate and lease data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Tenant financials and investor distributions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate lease and financial data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Multi-region. Investor distributions sensitivity.
